prediction.reasoning: PepsiCo (PEP) is a large-cap consumer staples stock with relatively low volatility. Based on historical volatility patterns for PEP (~20% annualized), a 20-day forecast shows modest expected movement. The point estimate assumes slight positive drift typical of blue-chip stocks. Confidence intervals are calculated using standard statistical methods assuming log-normal price distribution with historical volatility parameters. Consumer staples tend to have lower price volatility than growth stocks, resulting in relatively tight confidence bands.
